Video.summary: The second stage of the SCL heads to the FIBO convention, Cologne. The leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health hosts.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 2, Germany

Video.summary: The competitors battle it out in the special event, the Atlas Steel Stone. This stone is made completely from iron and cannot be touched with any support.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 8, England

Video.summary: Alex Moonen is leading. Part two of the competition in Romania showcases a new challenge - Hercules Hold.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 12, Romania Part 2

Video.summary: In this last episode, the best athletes compete in Pole Push, Deadlift, Forward Hold and Loading.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 16, Dubai World grand finals (Part 2)

Image.alt: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 16, Dubai World grand finals (Part 2)
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 16, Dubai World grand finals (Part 2)
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 16, Dubai World grand finals (Part 2)

Video.summary: We are in beautiful Norway for the kick off of the 2017 MLO Strongman Champions League season. With partly cloudy weather and lots of snow, we have the perfect scenery for the athletes, who prepare for the first contest of the year.
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 1, Norway

Video.summary: A definite highlight in this FIBO edition in Germany, Strongman Champions League introduced its new rules for a special team item. Graham Hicks tries here to set a New World Record on the biggest log in the world, currently held by Krzysztof Radzikowski. Boosted also by the presence of the acclaimed in the strongman circles names of Mark Felix and Danis Zageris.
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 2, Germany

Video.summary: The battle of the Dutch will take place this edition in Lichtenvoorde, a place very well known in Holland because of the famous “Black Cross”. The athletes will compete over six heavy events and the winner gets 25 Strongman Champions League ranking points.
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 4, Holland

Video.summary: After 15 outstanding competitions all over the world, finally we are here at the final competition of this year’s Strongman Champions League hosted in Turkey.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 16, World Finals Turkey

Image.alt: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 16, World Finals Turkey
SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 16, World Finals Turkey
SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 16, World Finals Turkey

Video.summary: Welcome to the land of Vikings - Norway - to the first stage of the SCL World Series 2016
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 1, Norway - World strongest Viking

Image.alt: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 1, Norway - World strongest Viking
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 1, Norway - World strongest Viking
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 1, Norway - World strongest Viking

Video.summary: For the third stage of SCL world series 2016, the athletes compete in Kaunas for the SCL Log Lift World Championships.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 3, Lithuania - Log lift World championship

Image.alt: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 3, Lithuania - Log lift World championship
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 3, Lithuania - Log lift World championship
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 3, Lithuania - Log lift World championship

Video.summary: The last chance to qualify for the World Grand Finale. Zageris and Belsak fight for the better position for the finals.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 14, Portugal

Video.summary: We reach Dubai where we will crown the new champion for SCL 2016. This is part one of the world finals.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 15, Dubai World grand finals (Part 1)

Image.alt: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 15, Dubai World grand finals (Part 1)
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 15, Dubai World grand finals (Part 1)
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 15, Dubai World grand finals (Part 1)

Video.summary: This weekend sees the Strongman Champions League Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. Big lifting names such as Graham Hicks , Vidas Blekaitis and Vytatus Lalas are in the startlist to push some big numbers.
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 3, Lithuania

Video.summary: The Strongman Champions League Train stops in Dubai again for the 3rd time, and is now bigger than ever. Hafthor Bjornsson makes his come back here at the SCL DUBAI. You simply cannot miss this most epic show at the World Trade Center in Dubai part 1.
Video.title: Stage 11 - DUBAI - 2024 - Part 1

Video.summary: Stage four is an epic competition and a few surprises. With 14 strongmen from all over the world, one newcomer left quite an impression.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 4, Holland

Video.summary: This year Lauri Nami joins the starting list, back after last year's injury in Romania
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 5, Latvia

Video.summary: The SCL train stopped in Zlatibor for the stage 6 of the MLO SCL. 11 compete for the title in the home country of legendary Ervin Katona.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 6, Serbia

Video.summary: Bulgaria hosts the next stage of the SCL. Current leader in the World Series is Matjaz Belsak, youngest competitor and strongest man of Slovenia.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 7, Bulgaria

Video.summary: This stage sees the strongmen visit Vaasa, Finland. Residents here are familiar with the competition because some of the SCL icons are from their country.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 9, Finland

Video.summary: 38 athletes compete in the under 90kg and under 105kg SCL World Championships. From each weight class, the top 12 qualify for the finals.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 10, Finland - World championship under 105 kilograms

Image.alt: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 10, Finland - World championship under 105 kilograms
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 10, Finland - World championship under 105 kilograms
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 10, Finland - World championship under 105 kilograms

Video.summary: A two day, seven event battle with lots of spectators.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 11, Romania Part 1

Video.summary: In this stage in Curacao no one wants to lose the chance to fight for one kilo gold in World grand finals in Dubai.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 13, Curacao

Video.summary: Set in the beautiful mountain resort Zlatibor, the fifth stage of the Strongman Champions League 2017 sees 14 athletes from across the world competing for the gold medal of SCL Serbia 2017. The event welcomes top-athlete - and odds-on favourite - Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia), who has presented himself in an impressive shape so far. Can his opponents defeat him?
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 5, Serbia

Video.summary: The next two stages take place in Quebec. With eight events over two days, SCL Canada is a true ‘heavyweight’. The athletes compete in: Truck Pull, Deadlift with cars, Log Lift, and the Atlas Stones. The World’s Strongest Viking Jean-Francois Caron from Canada is a favourite, as well as current SCL leader Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and promising underdog Jimmy Paquet (Canada).
Video.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 6, Canada (Part 1)
